<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create a host-private message bridge instance without adding a router or event bus.

## Import

```ts
import { createGraphMessageBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/microservices";
```

## Signature

```ts
function createGraphMessageBridge(opts: GraphMessageBridgeOptions<THost> = {}): GraphMessageBridge<THost>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `GraphMessageBridgeOptions<THost>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `GraphMessageBridge<THost>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { createGraphMessageBridge } from "@graphrefly/ts/adapters/nestjs/microservices";
```
